response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience (15+ years) in software engineering, including roles as Staff Software Engineer with AI-agent infrastructure work, and entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective. However, his resume lacks explicit AI expertise (e.g., ML models, AI platforms) or leadership at director-level, which is critical for the role. His background in cloud and AI-adjacent tooling (MCP, Node.js) is promising but not fully aligned with the AI strategy focus.
strengths: 15+ years in software and infrastructure engineering across diverse domains and technologies
Entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective, demonstrating product ownership and open-source contributions
AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling experience at re:cinq, showing relevant technical fluency
concerns: Lacks clear evidence of AI/ML expertise or recognized expertise in AI products/platforms
No director-level leadership experience or strategic advisory roles mentioned
Cloud expertise is implied but not explicitly highlighted; focus leans more toward web/mobile development

key_factors.factor: Director-level leadership and strategic advisory experience
Cloud and AI platform strategy alignment
